overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a character in a long dark coat traversing a snowy mountain canyon at night. The character transitions from walking to running as the environment opens from a narrow rocky passage to a wide valley with distant ruins and wooden camp structures, illuminated by warm lamp posts against a deep blue night sky.

events.description: passing by the first lit street lamp, casting warm light on the snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow snowy canyon, approaching a lit lamp post in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall dark rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
narrow trail covered in snow winding through the canyon
ornate black lamp post with warm yellow light illuminating the snow
snow-capped mountain visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy canyon flanked by tall rocky walls on both sides. A lit lamp post stands in the distance, casting a warm glow against the blue twilight, while snow covers the winding path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning mountain valley with distant ruins

events.description: canyon walls recede as the path opens into a wider valley
character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: walking through the widening valley, passing the first lamp post and approaching distant ruins visible on the horizon

entered.detail: large dark castle-like ruins silhouetted against the night sky
sparse leafless trees dotting the snowy hillside
second lit lamp post further down the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider valley as the character passes the first lamp post. Distant ruined structures become visible on the horizon against the dark blue sky, while scattered trees appear on the right hillside. The character maintains a steady walking pace before transitioning to a run at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with wooden campsite ruins

events.description: wooden camp structures and scaffolding become prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: running through the open snowy valley, passing wooden ruins and campsite structures on the right

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with beams and supports, possibly abandoned mining or camp structure
broken wooden scaffolding and debris scattered on the snow
low stone wall ruins partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the open valley as wooden camp structures and scaffolding come into view on the right. The distant ruins shift to the left side of the frame while the character moves swiftly along the snow-covered path, passing stone ruins and approaching the wooden debris field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic snowy canyon that gradually expands into a wide, open valley under a deep blue twilight. It begins with the character walking along a winding path flanked by towering rocky walls, moving toward the warm glow of a distant lamp post. As the character passes the light, the narrow passage opens into a broad valley where scattered trees and ruined structures emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts in momentum as the character transitions from a walk to a run, sweeping past stone ruins while wooden camp structures and scaffolding appear on the right. Finally, the camera tracks the character's swift movement across the snow-covered terrain as they approach a field of wooden debris.
